risk.h2: Don't Wait Until It's an Emergency
risk.p1: When a loved one struggles to breathe, every minute matters. Hospital oxygen is expensive, wait times are long, and renting from traditional suppliers often means 3–5 day lead times with confusing contracts.
risk.p2: Many families only discover they need a home oxygen machine after a hospital discharge — rushed, overwhelmed, and unsure where to start. Without a reliable oxygen concentrator at home, recovery slows and stress builds.
risk.p3: Oxihome exists to solve this. We deliver oxygen machines across Malaysia within 4 hours so your family gets the support they need — today, not next week.

products.h2: Rent or Buy Your Oxygen Machine

how.h2: Get Your Oxygen Machine in 3 Simple Steps
how.step1Desc: Send us a message on WhatsApp. Tell us what you need and where you are. We reply within minutes.
how.step2Desc: Pick rental or purchase. No deposit required for rentals. We handle everything — no paperwork, no long contracts.
how.step3Desc: Our team delivers your oxygen machine to your doorstep the same day. We set it up and show you how to use it.

reviews.r1: My father was discharged on Friday evening. I WhatsApped Oxihome and the oxygen concentrator arrived in 3 hours. Lifesaver.
reviews.r2: We compared 4 suppliers. Oxihome was the only one that could deliver same day. The machine is quiet and my mother sleeps through the night now.
reviews.r3: Renting the combo package saved us over RM500 compared to buying separately. The free oximeter is a nice bonus too.
reviews.r4: The delivery team arrived on time and set up everything. My mum was breathing comfortably within minutes.
reviews.r5: Rented for 3 months after dad's surgery. Easy to extend, no paperwork. Will use Oxihome again.
reviews.r6: Very affordable. The machine runs silently all night — my wife doesn't even notice it's on.
reviews.r7: Same-day delivery saved us when mum needed oxygen urgently at midnight. Thank you Oxihome.
reviews.r8: WhatsApp reply at 11pm, machine delivered by 8am. Incredible service.
reviews.r9: No deposit, no contract. Just plug and breathe. Exactly what we needed.

why.p1: Oxihome is Malaysia's dedicated home oxygen equipment provider. We focus on one thing — getting reliable oxygen machines into homes fast. Every unit is tested, sanitised, and delivered with everything you need to start immediately.
why.p2: Our team understands the urgency. Whether you need an oxygen concentrator for post-surgery recovery, a COPD management plan, or an emergency oxygen tank for backup, we deliver across 127 locations in Malaysia within 4 hours. No middlemen, no clinic markup, no waiting.

locations.sub: We deliver oxygen machines to 127 locations across Malaysia. Find your city below and WhatsApp us for same-day delivery.

faq.q1: How much does it cost to rent an oxygen machine in Malaysia?
faq.a1: Renting an oxygen concentrator starts from RM250 per month. This includes the machine, nasal cannula, and humidifier bottle. No deposit required — return anytime.
faq.a2: Yes. Oxihome offers 4-hour same-day delivery across 127 locations in Malaysia. WhatsApp us your address and we confirm your delivery window immediately.
faq.q3: What is included in the rental?
faq.a3: Every rental includes the OxiHome Mesin 5L oxygen concentrator, nasal cannula, and humidifier bottle. Our team delivers, sets up, and demonstrates the machine at your home.
faq.a4: No prescription is needed to rent or buy an oxygen machine from Oxihome. Our equipment is suitable for home use and wellness support.
faq.q5: What is the difference between an oxygen concentrator and an oxygen tank?
faq.a5: An oxygen concentrator pulls oxygen from the air and delivers it continuously — it never runs out as long as it has power. An oxygen tank holds a fixed compressed supply and needs refilling. Many families keep both: a concentrator for daily use and a tank for emergencies.
faq.q6: Can I buy instead of renting?
faq.a6: Absolutely. Purchase the OxiHome Mesin 5L outright for RM2,599 — that is RM601 below the typical market price of RM3,200. Installment plans at RM279/month for 10 months, no credit card required.
faq.q7: What if the machine breaks down?
faq.a7: If your rented oxygen machine has any issues, WhatsApp us and we will arrange a replacement delivery the same day. You are never left without oxygen support.

cta.sub: Your family deserves reliable oxygen support without the hospital price tag. Rent an oxygen machine from RM250/month with same-day delivery to your doorstep.
